name: Dragon Nails
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>族</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>爪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to a DARK monster. It gains 600 ATK, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. If this card is sent to the GY because the equipped monster was destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon that monster, and if you do, equip this card to it, but banish this card when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Dragon Nails" once per turn.
eff: Equip only to a DARK monster. It gains 600 ATK, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. If this card is sent to the GY because the equipped monster was destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon that monster, and if you do, equip this card to it, but banish this card when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Dragon Nails" once per turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
